mano_cua.result_summary: Grid demo页面有8个控件（Num columns/Num rows/Scroll to column/Scroll to row/List height/Row height/Overscan columns/Overscan rows），无Column Width控件。ColumnSizer子页面有Column Min Width和Column Max Width控件，设置Max Width=0后列宽变大（max约束被忽略），设置Min Width=0时被强制为1。无法通过UI将某列宽度设为0来测试Grid在列宽为0时的渲染表现。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Grid demo page has no column width control. ColumnSizer page has min/max column width controls but does not allow setting individual column widths to 0. Setting Column Max Width to 0 results in columns becoming wider (max constraint ignored), not narrower. Setting Column Min Width to 0 is enforced to 1 by the app.
